global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with bold text and geometric shapes.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring a simple design with rounded shapes.

elements.label: Exclusive tonight text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Exclusive tonight' is centrally placed, drawing attention with its large font size.

elements.label: New hits every week
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main headline, providing additional context about the offer.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in white, encouraging immediate action, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Several overlapping circular shapes in varying sizes, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center, providing a backdrop for the text elements.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: More geometric shapes scattered throughout the ad, enhancing the modern aesthetic.

elements.label: Small element
elements.description: A small, indistinct element located towards the bottom right, not clearly defined.

elements.label: Another small element
elements.description: Another small, indistinct element positioned towards the bottom left, lacking clear features.

elements.label: Main offer headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline at the bottom of the ad, prominently displaying the main offer.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring a simple design with rounded shapes.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, modern and vibrant, exclusive offers, bold text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
